common_style: kid-friendly illustration for ages 3-6, hand-drawn watercolor style with subtle paper texture, warm wood/paper Japanese children's book aesthetic, soft drop shadow, transparent PNG, centered subject, no text, no labels

sheets.prompt: A 4 columns × 2 rows grid (total 2048x1024) of 8 simple kid-friendly square color chips, each cell 512x512. Each chip has solid color, rounded corners, soft drop shadow. Top row left-to-right: red (#EF4444), blue (#3B82F6), yellow (#FBBF24), green (#10B981). Bottom row left-to-right: pink (#EC4899), orange (#F97316), purple (#8B5CF6), cyan (#06B6D4). All chips share the same hand-drawn watercolor style with subtle paper texture, warm Japanese children's book aesthetic, white space between cells. Transparent PNG. No text, no labels.

sheets.purpose: 8 basic shapes, 4x2 grid, sharp corners on geometric shapes
sheets.prompt: A 4 columns × 2 rows grid (total 2048x1024) of 8 simple kid-friendly basic shapes, each cell 512x512. Top row left-to-right: yellow (#FBBF24) circle, blue (#60A5FA) square (with SHARP 90-degree corners, NOT rounded), green (#10B981) equilateral triangle pointing up (with SHARP corners), orange (#F97316) 5-pointed star. Bottom row left-to-right: pink (#EC4899) heart, purple (#8B5CF6) horizontal rectangle (3:2 ratio, SHARP 90-degree corners), red (#EF4444) diamond/rhombus oriented as kite (SHARP corners), teal (#14B8A6) oval/egg shape (slightly taller than wide). IMPORTANT: square/triangle/rectangle/diamond must have CLEARLY DEFINED SHARP CORNERS (this teaches kids 'how many corners does this shape have'). Circle/heart/oval naturally have curves. All in hand-drawn watercolor style with subtle paper texture, warm Japanese children's book aesthetic, soft drop shadow. Transparent PNG. No text, no labels.

A 2 columns × 2 rows grid (total 1536x1024) of 4 weather/nature scenes for kids, each cell 768x512. Top-left: a clear 7-color rainbow over a hill (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet — clearly visible). Top-right: a small puddle on asphalt after rain, with soft reflection. Bottom-left: a single magnified hexagonal snowflake on dark blue background, intricate 6-fold symmetry clearly visible. Bottom-right: a typhoon spiral viewed from above, swirling clouds. All in hand-drawn watercolor children's book style with subtle paper texture, warm Japanese aesthetic, soft drop shadow. White space between cells. Transparent PNG. No text, no labels.
